title: festuca marginata subsp. marginata
intro: Festuca marginata subsp. marginata, also known as the mountain fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Festuca marginata subsp. marginata include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
